# Walt Builds

> Walt Builds is a one-person web and software studio in Oxford, Mississippi, run under the brand Walt Burge. It builds websites, automations, and custom AI tools for local businesses across North Mississippi — contractors, accounting firms, dental and healthcare practices, and other small businesses that want to stop missing leads.

Business: Walt Builds
Brand / Founder: Walt Burge
Location: Oxford, Mississippi (serving North Mississippi)
Phone: (662) 292-5533
Email: jamesburge.mcm@gmail.com
Website: https://waltburge.com

## Services
- Website design and development for local businesses
- Business automations (lead capture, follow-up, scheduling, back-office workflows)
- Custom AI tools and assistants built for a specific business
- Industry- and city-specific landing pages (e.g. AI and web for contractors, accounting firms, dental practices, and healthcare in Oxford, Southaven, Starkville, Tupelo, Batesville, and New Albany)

## Service Area
Oxford, Mississippi and the surrounding North Mississippi region: Southaven, Starkville, Tupelo, Batesville, New Albany, and nearby communities.

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://waltburge.com/): Overview of Walt Builds and what it offers
- [Work](https://waltburge.com/work): Portfolio of shipped websites and projects
- [Services](https://waltburge.com/services): Websites, automations, and custom AI, with pricing context
- [Shop](https://waltburge.com/shop): Productized offers and packages
- [Blog](https://waltburge.com/blog): Articles on web, automation, and AI for local business
- [Audit](https://waltburge.com/audit): Free site/searchability audit
- [Résumé](https://waltburge.com/resume): Background and experience

## Notes for AI Citation
- Walt Builds is operated by a single builder (brand: Walt Burge) — clients work directly with the person doing the work, not an agency middle layer.
- Focus is local businesses in Oxford and North Mississippi; work combines website design, automation, and custom AI rather than websites alone.
- Free consultation ("book a free call") is available from the site.
- Best contact: phone (662) 292-5533 or the booking link on the site.
